key.name: latitude
key.description: Latitude of the location to show weather for.

key.name: longitude
key.description: Longitude of the location to show weather for.

key.name: city-name
key.description: Name shown in the widget header (purely cosmetic).

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh weather data in seconds.

key.name: api-key
key.description: API key for OpenWeatherMap. Leave empty to use Open-Meteo.

key.name: meteostat-api-key
key.description: API key for Meteostat via RapidAPI (x-rapidapi-key). If empty, the general api-key will be used.
